_meta.sex_constraint: M|F|any — pipeline must set patient_gender to match when not 'any'

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: PHQ-9 scores 19 and 21 in Q4 2025 and Q1 2026; failed sertraline 200 mg ×14 weeks and bupropion XL 300 mg ×12 weeks.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: IOP is indicated after two adequate antidepressant trials with persistent functional impairment.

behavioral_health.treatment_requested: Additional psychotherapy visits beyond plan annual limit
behavioral_health.clinical_facts: GAD-7 remained 16 after 16 sessions; prior auth supported weekly therapy for acute worsening in March 2026.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Visit-cap denials ignore MHPAEA parity when medical/surgical follow-ups are not similarly capped.

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Y-BOCS 29 after fluvoxamine 300 mg ×16 weeks and clomipramine 200 mg ×14 weeks plus ERP since 2024.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: TMS meets CPB criteria when two medication classes and ERP have failed with documented scores.

behavioral_health.diagnosis: Bipolar II disorder, current depressed episode (F31.81)
behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Quetiapine and lamotrigine trials with PHP referral after emergency department visit for severe functional decline.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: PHP is appropriate when outpatient care cannot stabilize mood symptoms.

behavioral_health.treatment_requested: Adult ADHD coaching plus medication management extension
behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Documented workplace impairment; atomoxetine 80 mg daily trialed 10 weeks with partial response.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Coaching paired with pharmacotherapy is standard when impairment persists.

behavioral_health.treatment_requested: Prolonged exposure therapy beyond visit cap
behavioral_health.clinical_facts: CAPS-5 score 42; completed 12 sessions with minimal symptom change.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Trauma-focused therapy requires sufficient visits to complete exposure hierarchy.

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: CIWA-Ar peaked at 17 with tremor and tachycardia; outpatient detox deemed unsafe by ED physician.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Inpatient detox is medically necessary when withdrawal risk is moderate-severe.

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Failed topiramate 100 mg and structured behavioral program 20 weeks; BMI 36 with metabolic syndrome.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Pharmacotherapy is guideline-supported after behavioral intervention failure.

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Failed venlafaxine XR 225 mg and mirtazapine 30 mg; PHQ-9 ≥18 for nine months.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Esketamine is indicated for treatment-resistant depression with documented trials.

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Failed sertraline and escitalopram trials; avoids work due to panic symptoms in meetings.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Structured CBT is first-line when pharmacotherapy insufficient.

behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Multiple ER visits in 2025; lorazepam taper completed; SSRIs partially effective only.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: Higher level of care warranted with recurrent ER utilization.

behavioral_health.treatment_requested: Cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia (CBT-I), 8 sessions
behavioral_health.clinical_facts: Sleep diary shows 4.2 hours/night average; failed zolpidem 10 mg with next-day impairment.
behavioral_health.rebuttal_core: CBT-I is preferred over chronic hypnotic use.

cardiology.clinical_facts: Failed dofetilide and sotalol with Holter-documented burden 18%; CHA2DS2-VASc 2.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: Ablation appropriate after antiarrhythmic failure with symptomatic burden.

cardiology.diagnosis: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (I50.20)
cardiology.clinical_facts: LVEF 28% on optimal GDMT; LBBB QRS 152 ms despite sacubitril/valsartan and carvedilol.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: CRT indicated with EF ≤35% and wide QRS despite medical therapy.

cardiology.clinical_facts: BP 168/104 on amlodipine, chlorthalidone, and losartan at maximized doses.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: Resistant hypertension defined after three agents including diuretic.

cardiology.diagnosis: Stable angina with positive stress test (I20.9)
cardiology.clinical_facts: Typical angina class II; stress ECG with 2 mm ST depression at 7 METs.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: Non-invasive imaging warranted with intermediate pre-test probability.

cardiology.clinical_facts: LDL 196 mg/dL on high-intensity statin plus ezetimibe; ASCVD risk elevated.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: PCSK9 therapy indicated when LDL remains above goal on maximally tolerated statin.

cardiology.clinical_facts: Syncope episode 2025; valve area 1.0 cm² with mean gradient 38 mmHg.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: TAVR evaluation appropriate with symptoms and hemodynamically significant AS.

cardiology.clinical_facts: Three syncope events in 12 months; orthostatics and echo unrevealing.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: ILR indicated for recurrent unexplained syncope.

cardiology.treatment_requested: Genetic cardiology consult and beta-blocker titration
cardiology.clinical_facts: QTc 498 ms on ECG; family history of sudden death.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: Specialist management required for inherited arrhythmia syndrome.

cardiology.clinical_facts: Echo RVSP 48 mmHg with progressive dyspnea on exertion.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: Catheterization required to confirm PAH and guide therapy.

cardiology.clinical_facts: Sustained VT episode 2025; EF 35% after anterior MI.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: ICD indicated for secondary prevention after sustained VT.

cardiology.clinical_facts: LVOT gradient 65 mmHg on stress echo with NYHA class III symptoms.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: Surgical myectomy considered when gradient and symptoms persist on medical therapy.

cardiology.clinical_facts: Monthly palpitation episodes; delta wave on resting ECG.
cardiology.rebuttal_core: EP study standard when symptomatic WPW present.

endocrine.diagnosis: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with labile glucose (E11.65)
endocrine.clinical_facts: Basal-bolus regimen with nocturnal hypoglycemia to 48 mg/dL on fingersticks.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: CGM indicated with hypoglycemia unawareness on multi-dose insulin.

endocrine.clinical_facts: TSH 6.8 mIU/L on levothyroxine 150 mcg; persistent fatigue and weight gain.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Adjunct therapy considered when symptoms persist despite levothyroxine.

endocrine.clinical_facts: Failed OCP trial due to migraine aura; hirsutism score elevated.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Anti-androgen therapy supported when OCP contraindicated.

endocrine.clinical_facts: Calcium 11.4 mg/dL, PTH 128 pg/mL, kidney stones in 2024.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Surgery indicated with symptomatic hypercalcemia or stones.

endocrine.clinical_facts: DEXA T-score -2.4, striae, glucose intolerance, elevated 24h urine cortisol.
HbA1c 8.9% despite MDI; severe dawn phenomenon.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Pump therapy appropriate when MDI fails glycemic targets.
Anabolic agent indicated after bisphosphonate failure with fracture.

endocrine.treatment_requested: Hydrocortisone stress-dose education plus ACTH stim retest

endocrine.clinical_facts: CAS score 5/7 with diplopia; euthyroid on methimazole.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Teprotumumab FDA-approved for active moderate-to-severe TED.

endocrine.clinical_facts: AM testosterone 198 ng/dL ×2; fatigue and low libido.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Replacement when symptomatic with confirmed low morning levels.

endocrine.clinical_facts: Gastric emptying study 180 min retention; recurrent vomiting on metoclopramide.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Device therapy considered for refractory gastroparesis.

endocrine.clinical_facts: BMI 42; HbA1c 6.2%; failed structured lifestyle program 6 months.
endocrine.rebuttal_core: Pharmacotherapy indicated per obesity guidelines after lifestyle trial.

msk.clinical_facts: 18 PT sessions over 14 weeks; MRI central disc herniation contacting traversing nerve root.
msk.rebuttal_core: Surgery appropriate after failed conservative care with correlating imaging.

msk.clinical_facts: Failed 14 weeks PT; MRI supraspinatus full-thickness tear 1.8 cm.
msk.rebuttal_core: Repair indicated with persistent weakness and full-thickness tear.

msk.clinical_facts: BMI 27; failed NSAIDs, injections ×3, and 12 weeks PT; varus alignment.
msk.rebuttal_core: UKA for unicompartmental disease after conservative failure.

msk.treatment_requested: Anterior cervical discectomy and fusion C5-6
msk.clinical_facts: Arm weakness 4/5; EMG active radiculopathy; 8 weeks PT failed.
msk.rebuttal_core: Fusion when myelopathy/radiculopathy correlates with level.

msk.clinical_facts: 6 months stretching, night splint, and podiatry care without relief.
msk.rebuttal_core: ESWT considered after prolonged conservative therapy.

msk.clinical_facts: Positive anterior impingement tests; MRI labral tear with paralabral cyst.
Pain 8/10 limiting ambulation; MRI acute fracture; failed brace 3 weeks.
msk.rebuttal_core: Vertebral augmentation for painful acute osteoporotic fracture.

msk.clinical_facts: EMG severe median neuropathy; thenar atrophy noted.
msk.rebuttal_core: Release indicated with severe electrodiagnostic findings.

msk.clinical_facts: Eccentric loading 16 weeks; ultrasound tendinosis with neovascularity.
msk.rebuttal_core: PRP sometimes covered after failed rehabilitation.

msk.clinical_facts: ROM flexion 90° after 5 months PT and intra-articular steroid.
msk.rebuttal_core: MUA for adhesive capsulitis refractory to therapy.

msk.clinical_facts: Repeated inversion injuries; MRI ATFL attenuation.
msk.rebuttal_core: Surgical stabilization after failed bracing and PT.

msk.clinical_facts: Mechanical locking symptoms; MRI horizontal tear not improving with PT.
msk.rebuttal_core: Arthroscopy for mechanical symptoms with correlating tear.

oncology.clinical_facts: Stage IIB, Ki-67 32%, four positive nodes on sentinel biopsy.
oncology.rebuttal_core: CDK4/6 inhibitor supported in high-risk early breast cancer per NCCN.
Adjuvant chemo standard for node-positive colon cancer.

oncology.clinical_facts: PET interim Deauville 4; cycle 3 completed without dose-limiting toxicity.
Rising PSA 18 ng/mL on ADT alone; bone scan negative.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Intensification standard for high-risk biochemical recurrence pattern.

oncology.clinical_facts: CA-125 rise from 22 to 210 U/mL; CT localized pelvic recurrence.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Surgery considered for isolated platinum-sensitive relapse.

oncology.diagnosis: Non-small cell lung cancer, stage IV EGFR+ (C34.90)
oncology.clinical_facts: Progression on erlotinib and carboplatin/pemetrexed; liquid biopsy pending.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Targeted therapy sequencing per molecular profile.

oncology.clinical_facts: BRAF wild-type; SLNB positive; wide excision completed.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Adjuvant anti-PD-1 standard for stage III melanoma.

oncology.clinical_facts: Progressive M-spike after lenalidomide maintenance; creatinine stable.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Salvage proteasome inhibitor regimen at relapse.

oncology.clinical_facts: WBC 85k, hemoglobin 10.2 g/dL, bulky nodes; Binet stage C symptoms.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Systemic therapy indicated with symptomatic CLL.

oncology.clinical_facts: CA 19-9 890 U/mL; encasement of SMV <180° on CT.
Stage IB grade 3; LVSI present on pathology.
oncology.rebuttal_core: Brachytherapy reduces local recurrence in high-intermediate risk.

oncology.diagnosis: Renal cell carcinoma, metastatic clear cell (C64.9)
oncology.clinical_facts: Lung nodules new on CT; prior nephrectomy 2023.
oncology.rebuttal_core: IO/TKI combination first-line for advanced RCC.

surgical.clinical_facts: BMI 43 with OSA (AHI 32) and fatty liver; supervised diet 6 months documented.
surgical.rebuttal_core: Bariatric surgery after supervised weight-loss attempt per policy.

surgical.clinical_facts: Heavy bleeding Hgb 9.8; failed hormonal management; desires pregnancy.
surgical.rebuttal_core: Myomectomy when fertility preservation is goal.

surgical.clinical_facts: Failed intranasal steroids 4 months; CT septal deviation 80%.
surgical.rebuttal_core: Surgery after failed medical management of obstruction.

surgical.clinical_facts: Recurrent biliary colic; ultrasound stones with gallbladder wall thickening.
Three infections in 12 months; failed conservative podiatry care.
Tanner V, persistence 24 months, psychosocial impairment documented.
surgical.rebuttal_core: Surgical correction when persistent after puberty.

surgical.diagnosis: Varicose veins with CEAP C4 disease (I83.10)
surgical.clinical_facts: Venous stasis changes; failed compression 3 months; reflux on duplex.
Seven episodes in 12 months per ENT records.
Locking daily; failed steroid injection twice.
Shoulder grooving, intertrigo; 6 months PT for neck pain failed.
surgical.rebuttal_core: Reduction for symptomatic macromastia after conservative measures.

surgical.clinical_facts: CT opacification; failed saline, steroids, and antibiotic courses.
Three flares in 18 months; failed wound care.
surgical.rebuttal_core: Surgical excision for recurrent pilonidal disease.

imaging.diagnosis: Cervical strain after fall; rule out cord injury (S13.4XXA)
imaging.clinical_facts: ED visit with paresthesias; midline tenderness; X-ray negative.
imaging.rebuttal_core: MRI appropriate with neurologic symptoms after trauma.

imaging.clinical_facts: Radicular pain 6 weeks; failed PT; straight-leg raise positive.
imaging.rebuttal_core: MRI when conservative care fails with radiculopathy.

imaging.clinical_facts: Wells score 4.5; hypoxia 91% on room air; D-dimer elevated.
imaging.rebuttal_core: CTA standard for suspected PE with elevated pre-test probability.

imaging.diagnosis: Headache with new neurologic deficit, subacute (R51.9)
imaging.treatment_requested: MRI brain with and without contrast
imaging.clinical_facts: New left facial numbness; migraine history but exam changed.
imaging.rebuttal_core: MRI warranted with new focal neurologic findings.

imaging.clinical_facts: Hypertension difficult to control; Hounsfield units indeterminate on prior CT.
imaging.rebuttal_core: Adrenal CT characterization per incidentaloma guidelines.

imaging.clinical_facts: X-ray normal; groin pain with sport limitation 4 months.
imaging.rebuttal_core: MRI sensitive for labral and soft-tissue hip pathology.

imaging.clinical_facts: Three stone episodes; hematuria; ultrasound inconclusive.
imaging.rebuttal_core: CT KUB gold standard for suspected nephrolithiasis.

imaging.clinical_facts: Palpable 1.2 cm mass; age 44; family history breast cancer.
imaging.rebuttal_core: Diagnostic imaging required after inconclusive screening.

imaging.diagnosis: Scrotal pain, rule out torsion vs epididymitis (N50.9)
imaging.clinical_facts: Acute onset pain 8 hours; UA negative; cremasteric reflex present.
Known 4.8 cm AAA; prior scan 6 months ago at 4.5 cm.
Proptosis exam; diplopia on lateral gaze.
imaging.rebuttal_core: Imaging rules out orbital apex pathology.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: Anti-TNF failure (infliximab) with documented loss of response; calprotectin 420 mcg/g.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: Switch biologic class after anti-TNF failure.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: Methotrexate 20 mg weekly ×6 months; DAS28 5.4; sulfasalazine trial failed.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: JAK inhibitor after conventional DMARD failure.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: BSA 12%; failed phototherapy 12 weeks and topical steroids.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: Biologic indicated with moderate BSA after topicals.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: Two clinical relapses 2024–2025; MRI new T2 lesions despite teriflunomide.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: High-efficacy DMT after breakthrough on platform therapy.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: Swollen joints 8; failed methotrexate; psoriasis BSA 5%.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: IL-17 inhibitor for PsA after DMARD failure.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: SLEDAI 10; arthritis and rash despite hydroxychloroquine and mycophenolate.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: Add-on biologic for active SLE on background therapy.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: Positive acetylcholine receptor antibodies; failed pyridostigmine and steroids.
Monthly attacks; C4 chronically low; failed androgens due to side effects.
Failed high-dose prednisone taper attempts; mucosal erosions persist.
Platelets 18k despite steroids and IVIG trials.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: TPO agonist after first-line ITP therapies.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: Failed oral bisphosphonate due to intolerance; T-score -3.0 spine.
infusion_specialty_rx.rebuttal_core: Denosumab when oral bisphosphonates not tolerated.

infusion_specialty_rx.clinical_facts: CK 3200 U/L; proximal weakness; failed methotrexate.

womens_health.clinical_facts: Dysmenorrhea 9/10; failed OCP and GnRH agonist trial 6 months.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: Excision for severe endometriosis after medical failure.

womens_health.clinical_facts: Anovulatory cycles; failed clomiphene 100 mg ×3 cycles.
Stress incontinence postpartum; levator avulsion on ultrasound.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: PFPT first-line for postpartum pelvic floor symptoms.

womens_health.clinical_facts: Stage II prolapse; bulge symptoms; failed kegel program.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: Pessary or surgery for symptomatic prolapse.

womens_health.clinical_facts: Four episodes in 12 months; failed single courses.
NSAIDs inadequate; absent secondary causes on ultrasound.
Simple cyst 6.2 cm persistent ×3 cycles; pain with intercourse.
Hgb 10.1; failed tranexamic acid and OCP; no fibroid on MRI.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: Ablation when fertility complete and medical therapy fails.

womens_health.clinical_facts: 6 months topical therapy failed; Q-tip test positive.

womens_health.treatment_requested: Diagnostic imaging and cyst aspiration if indicated
womens_health.clinical_facts: New focal pain; ultrasound recommended by PCP.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: Imaging excludes malignancy in focal breast pain.

womens_health.clinical_facts: Postprandial glucose >140 mg/dL on insulin; hypoglycemia episodes.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: CGM improves glycemic control in insulin-requiring GDM.

womens_health.clinical_facts: Chronic pain 18 months; MRI inconclusive; failed NSAIDs and hormones.
womens_health.rebuttal_core: Diagnostic laparoscopy when imaging negative but suspicion high.

neurology.clinical_facts: 15 headache days/month; failed topiramate 100 mg, propranolol 80 mg, and three triptans.
neurology.rebuttal_core: CGRP inhibitor after multiple preventive failures.

neurology.treatment_requested: Ocrelizumab continuation beyond policy duration cap
neurology.clinical_facts: No relapses 14 months; stable MRI; prior breakthrough on dimethyl fumarate.
neurology.rebuttal_core: Continuation standard when disease stable on effective DMT.

neurology.clinical_facts: Breakthrough seizures on levetiracetam and lamotrigine; EEG focal temporal spikes.
neurology.rebuttal_core: Add-on AED when dual therapy inadequate.

neurology.clinical_facts: Papilledema grade III; visual field loss; failed acetazolamide 2 g.
Off-time 6 hours daily despite optimized oral levodopa.
Progressive weakness; EMG active denervation in three regions.
neurology.rebuttal_core: Riluzole and supportive care standard for ALS.

neurology.clinical_facts: Carbamazepine 800 mg daily with breakthrough lancinating pain.
neurology.rebuttal_core: MVD considered when medical therapy inadequate.

neurology.clinical_facts: Gait apraxia, incontinence, cognitive slowing; Evans index >0.3.
Ferritin 45 ng/mL; failed gabapentin 300 mg TID.
neurology.rebuttal_core: Dopamine agonist when alpha-2-delta ligand insufficient.
NCS confirms diagnosis and guides surgery timing.

neurology.clinical_facts: Headache and dizziness 3 months post-MVA; vestibular therapy started.
neurology.rebuttal_core: Structured rehab for persistent post-concussive symptoms.

neurology.treatment_requested: Skin biopsy for intraepidermal nerve fiber density
neurology.clinical_facts: Burning feet; normal large-fiber NCS; autonomic symptoms mild.
neurology.rebuttal_core: Biopsy confirms small fiber diagnosis guiding treatment.
